hooks.command:
# Auto-format Python files with ruff
if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ \.py$ ]]; then
  file_path="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH}"
  if command -v ruff &>/dev/null; then
    ruff format "$file_path" 2>&1
    ruff check --fix --silent "$file_path" 2>&1
    echo '{"feedback": "Python formatting applied.", "suppressOutput": true}'
  fi
fi

# Auto-install dependencies when requirements.txt changes
if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ requirements.*\.txt$ ]]; then
  echo '{"feedback": "Installing dependencies..."}' >&2
  pip install -r "${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH}" --quiet 2>&1 && echo '{"feedback": "Dependencies installed.", "suppressOutput": true}' || {
    echo '{"feedback": "Failed to install dependencies."}' >&2
    exit 1
  }
fi

# Auto-run tests when test files change
if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ (test_.*\.py|.*_test\.py|conftest\.py)$ ]]; then
  if command -v pytest &>/dev/null; then
    echo '{"feedback": "Running tests..."}' >&2
    pytest "${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH}" --tb=short -q 2>&1 | tail -30
    exit_code=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
    if [ $exit_code -eq 0 ]; then
      echo '{"feedback": "Tests passed."}'
    else
      echo '{"feedback": "Tests failed. See output above."}' >&2
    fi
  fi
fi

# Type-check Python files with pyright
if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ \.py$ ]]; then
  if command -v pyright &>/dev/null; then
    echo '{"feedback": "Checking Python types..."}' >&2
    output=$(pyright "${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH}" 2>&1)
    exit_code=$?
    if [ $exit_code -eq 0 ]; then
      echo '{"feedback": "No type errors.", "suppressOutput": true}'
    else
      errors=$(echo "$output" | grep -E "error:" | head -10)
      if [ -n "$errors" ]; then
        echo '{"feedback": "Pyright found type errors:"}' >&2
        echo "$errors" >&2
      fi
    fi
    # Non-blocking
    exit 0
  fi
fi
